title: Xenial Garlicky Greek Pork Back Ribs Avgolemono
description: A garlicky and pillowy Greek dish featuring pork back ribs, this avgolemono is perfect for a weeknight dinner. It is halal-friendly and features a bonito shave for added flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, chicken broth, olive oil, and dried oregano.
Add the pork back ribs to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and arrange the ribs on it.
Bake the ribs in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
While the ribs are baking, mince the garlic and mix it with a little water to make a paste.
After the ribs have baked for 30 minutes, brush the garlic paste all over them.
Return the ribs to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the oven and let them rest for a few minutes.
Shave the bonito flakes over the ribs and serve hot.
